message:
feat(workflows/runner): tick 184 final 3 lifecycle helpers cx-threaded (ft-xbnl0.2.3)

Seventh tick of the workflows/runner.rs strangler-fig. Finishes
cx-threading for the remaining 3 lifecycle helpers.

New helpers (same _with_cx + _maybe_cx dispatcher pattern as
ticks 182-183):
- set_execution_waiting_with_cx + _maybe_cx — routes
  get_workflow + upsert_workflow through cx-first siblings.
- complete_execution_with_cx + _maybe_cx — same 3-storage-call
  pattern as fail_execution_with_cx; metric-write warn-only.
- mark_trigger_event_handled_with_cx + _maybe_cx — routes
  get_workflow + mark_event_handled (a tick-136 cluster write)
  through cx-first siblings.

Call-site migrations (12 total):
- L595 (cleanup after plan-validation error) →
  mark_trigger_event_handled_maybe_cx
- L654 (inside tick 181 cancel seam, Some(cx) arm) →
  mark_trigger_event_handled_with_cx (direct; the inner cx is
  already &Cx via if-let-Some shadowing)
- L976, L1580 → complete_execution_maybe_cx
- L988 → mark_trigger_event_handled_maybe_cx ("completed")
- L1042 → mark_trigger_event_handled_maybe_cx ("failed")
- L1095 → mark_trigger_event_handled_maybe_cx ("aborted")
- L1136 → set_execution_waiting_maybe_cx
- L1405 → mark_trigger_event_handled_maybe_cx ("denied")
- L1478 → mark_trigger_event_handled_maybe_cx
  ("requires_approval")
- L1536 → mark_trigger_event_handled_maybe_cx ("error")
- L1592 → mark_trigger_event_handled_maybe_cx ("completed")
- L2689 (inside abort_execution_with_cx) →
  mark_trigger_event_handled_with_cx (direct; cx is &Cx in
  scope)

Legacy helpers + callers at L2551 (legacy abort_execution) +
dispatcher fallback lines preserved for ambient-cx path.

This completes every lifecycle-helper storage seam in
run_workflow_inner — update_execution_step, fail_execution,
complete_execution, mark_trigger_event_handled, and
set_execution_waiting all thread caller cx into storage when
cx is Some.

Verified via fork bypass: 31/31 workflows::runner:: tests pass.

Strangler-fig progress:
- ✅ Tick 178: entry shim
- ✅ Tick 179: engine-helper cx siblings
- ✅ Tick 180: startup storage reads
- ✅ Tick 181: per-step cancel seam
- ✅ Tick 182: update_execution_step (4 sites)
- ✅ Tick 183: fail_execution (7 sites)
- ✅ Tick 184: set_execution_waiting + complete_execution +
  mark_trigger_event_handled (12 sites) — this
- Tick 185: migrate 2 legacy callers `run` (L1566) +
  `resume_incomplete` (L1741) to use run_workflow_with_cx —
  requires threading cx into both enclosing fns, which propagates
  to cross-crate callers.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
